blog-second-post.title: Earn Today, Save For Tomorrow
blog-second-post.content:
Making money is a skill. I’m convinced you can go from making 0 a day to 100K if you put in the work. But it comes down to how you approach it.
Taking the time to learn a this skill and apply it is what matters most.
Let’s start with the basics:

What are you good at?
What market do you want to serve?
What are you interested in most?

It’s not a question of passion it’s a question of ‘interest’. Taking the time to truly know yourself and what you like or dislike. Could you site behind a computer for 8 hours? Or do you want to be in the outside?
